title: Herbal Quinua Custard
description: A nostalgic Peruvian dish featuring a fluffy and herbal quinoa custard that is both vegetarian and Jain-friendly.
instructions: Rinse quinoa under cold water and soak it for at least 30 minutes.
Heat almond milk in a pot over medium heat until warm but not boiling.
Add honey, vanilla extract, chia seeds, cinnamon powder, and chamomile tea bags to the hot almond milk. Stir well to combine.
Simmer the mixture for about 5-7 minutes until it begins to thicken slightly.
Remove the tea bags and let the custard cool to room temperature before transferring it into an airtight container.
Cover the container with plastic wrap or aluminum foil and refrigerate overnight. The next day, gently stir in cardamom powder for added flavor.
